name: Terragrunt
description: Run Terragrunt commands (install option + arbitrary terragrunt subcommands).
author: Your Name
helpMarkDown: Run terragrunt commands on the agent.

inputs.name: install
inputs.label: Install Terragrunt if missing
inputs.helpMarkDown: If enabled, the task will attempt to download and install terragrunt on the agent before running the command.

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: Terragrunt command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Terragrunt subcommand to run (e.g. init, plan, apply, destroy, run-all, output).

inputs.name: workingDirectory
inputs.label: Working directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Working directory to run terragrunt in (defaults to repo root).
